label: Germany / German
ladderNote: Everyday German from r/de, gutefrage, DAK/AOK, and Parship. Freundschaft Plus (F+) is the local FWB label; Situationship is common among younger Germans.

levels.meaning: Hitting on someone / flirting. Anbaggern is colloquial German.
Getting to know each other — the standard German early-dating frame.
One-night stand. Common German usage of the English term.
Friends with benefits. The usual German label (also Freunde mit gewissen Vorzügen).
Dating / meeting up; may still be non-exclusive.
Undefined gray zone between F+ and a feste Beziehung. Covered in German health/lifestyle media and r/de.

levels.term: Exklusiv / nichts Festes… aber nur wir
levels.meaning: Exclusive without calling it a feste Beziehung yet.
Official couple / in a relationship. The classic German label.
